project.name: MiroShark S2S
project.description: Current MiroShark architecture (Vue SPA + Flask + Neo4j + Wonderwall multi-agent sim) plus the planned Service-to-Service (S2S) interface layer that lets the Pattern-Amp / Bazodiac product drive MiroShark as a scenario-simulation service. Nodes/edges with status 'planned' mark interfaces still to be designed and implemented.

detail.title: Pattern Amp UI
detail.subtitle: external presentation · branch visualization
flow: User opens Pattern Amp and triggers 'Run Scenario' (manual / eve_hypotheses_change / daily_06)
Polls run status, then renders ScenarioBranchV1[] as branch-fan / pattern field
Shows confidence, source weights, coherence/tension delta, notToInfer, reflective questions, provenance
detail.notes: Shows possibility directions, never raw data or deterministic 'fate' answers.
constraints: No raw Supabase data exposed to UI

detail.title: Bazodiac / Pattern-Amp Backend
detail.subtitle: external orchestrator · owns the scenario pipeline
flow: Loads required + recommended tables from Supabase (server-side, with service key)
Appends invariant Generic Scenario Prompt + Simulation Config
Calls MiroShark over S2S, polls, then normalizes output to ScenarioBranchV1[]
detail.notes: Holds Supabase service keys. MiroShark must NEVER receive raw tables, service keys, or full raw transcripts.
constraints: Send to MiroShark ONLY: ScenarioSeed.md + Generic Scenario Prompt + Simulation Config
Strip secrets and irrelevant fields before crossing the S2S boundary
risks: Leaking PII / service keys across the boundary

detail.title: Supabase (Pattern-Amp data)
detail.subtitle: external data store · per-user source tables
flow: P0: profiles, astro_profiles, natal_charts, eve_hypotheses, eve_anchors, daily_pulses, daily_interpretations
P1: eve_hypothesis_events, eve_sessions, agent_conversations, daily_horoscope_cache, space_weather_cache, cosmic_weather_snapshots
schemas: 3 contexts: User Base Context, Pattern Context (7 Eve hypotheses), Temporal Context
detail.notes: eve_hypotheses is the primary V1 source (patterns, confidence, triggers, exceptions, counter-evidence, subpatterns, protective function).
constraints: Accessed only by Bazodiac backend, never by MiroShark directly
risks: Stale weather caches must be down-weighted

detail.title: Scenario persistence tables (MISSING)
detail.subtitle: planned data · run lifecycle persistence
flow: scenario_seed_documents - exact seed sent to MiroShark
scenario_trigger_events - dedupe for hypotheses-change & daily triggers
detail.notes: Not yet present in Supabase per last DB query. Required for polling, debugging and repeatable runs.
constraints: Must exist before clean app logic (polling/retry) is possible
risks: Without these, only manual one-off MiroShark feeding is possible

detail.title: Scenario Orchestrator (Bazodiac side)
detail.subtitle: planned service · seed builder + result normalizer
flow: Render ScenarioSeed.md from template (markdown is the MiroShark input)
Attach invariant Generic Scenario Prompt + Simulation Config + Trigger Source + Data Completeness
Submit to MiroShark, poll status, collect raw output
detail.notes: DECISION POINT: lives as a Bazodiac module calling MiroShark over HTTP. Seed = WHAT to simulate; Generic Prompt = HOW; Config = mode/horizon.
constraints: MiroShark receives only Seed.md + Generic Prompt + Config
quiz weight must be 0/absent in V1
risks: MiroShark output may not be directly renderable -> normalizer is mandatory

detail.title: MiroShark Scenario API (proposed S2S facade)
detail.subtitle: planned api · stable contract for Pattern-Amp
flow: Accept seed + generic prompt + config in one call
Internally drive prepare -> start -> run-status -> report via SimulationManager
Expose run lifecycle + normalized branches for polling

apis.desc: Submit ScenarioSeed.md + generic prompt + simulation config; returns runId. Idempotent on trigger_key.
Run status: queued|running|completed|failed (+ MiroShark simulation_id mapping).

detail.notes: Alternative to making Bazodiac orchestrate raw /api/simulation/* + /api/report/* directly. Wraps them behind one S2S contract.
constraints: Stateless contract; map runId -> simulation_id internally
risks: If skipped, every consumer must re-implement the prepare/start/poll/report dance

detail.title: MiroShark Frontend (Vue 3 + Vite)
detail.subtitle: ui · existing operator/spectator app
flow: Interaction / Replay / Compare / Embed / Explore / Verified views
detail.notes: Talks to backend via /api/*. Not on the S2S path - Pattern-Amp uses its own UI.

detail.title: Simulation API
detail.subtitle: api · create/prepare/start/stop/status
flow: Primary entry an S2S caller would use TODAY (no /api/scenario yet)

apis.desc: Create a simulation from a project.
Generate config + agent profiles for a run.
LLM scenario suggestions from a prompt.

detail.notes: Backed by backend/app/api/simulation.py (large). Routes verified from source.
constraints: /api/* needs x-miroshark-internal-key when MIROSHARK_INTERNAL_KEY set; relaxed in DEBUG
risks: No single-call scenario contract today -> orchestration burden on caller

detail.title: Report API
detail.subtitle: api · report generation + retrieval
flow: S2S caller fetches the final structured report after a run

apis.desc: Generate final report for a simulation.

detail.notes: Backed by backend/app/api/report.py + services/report_agent.py.
risks: Report format != ScenarioBranchV1 -> normalizer needed on Bazodiac side

detail.title: Graph API
detail.subtitle: api · project graph + ontology build
flow: Build the knowledge graph that grounds a simulation
detail.notes: Backed by backend/app/api/graph.py + storage/neo4j_storage.py.

detail.title: MCP API
detail.subtitle: api · MCP server bridge + tool catalog
flow: Exposes graph/report tools to external MCP clients (list_graphs, search_graph, browse_clusters, list_reports, get_reasoning_trace ...)

apis.desc: MCP bridge status + tool catalog + config snippets.

detail.notes: Possible alternate S2S surface: Pattern-Amp could consume MiroShark via MCP instead of REST.

detail.title: Templates / Settings / Observability / Feed / Docs / Public
detail.subtitle: api · supporting endpoints
detail.notes: OpenAPI already published at /api/openapi.json - useful base for the S2S contract.

detail.title: SimulationManager
detail.subtitle: service · orchestrates simulation state
detail.notes: backend/app/services/simulation_manager.py. Natural internal target for /api/scenario.

detail.title: SimulationRunner
detail.subtitle: service · spawns a subprocess per run
flow: register_cleanup() on app startup for safe teardown
detail.notes: backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py (very large). Runs out-of-process.
risks: Subprocess lifecycle/cleanup must survive S2S concurrency

detail.title: SimulationIPC
detail.subtitle: service · socket-based IPC
flow: Client/Server over socket between backend and run subprocess
detail.notes: backend/app/services/simulation_ipc.py.

detail.title: SimulationConfigGenerator
detail.subtitle: service · builds run config
flow: Derives SimulationParameters, AgentActivity, Time, Event, Platform config from a scenario
detail.notes: Maps an incoming ScenarioSeed/Config onto a Wonderwall run config.
risks: S2S SimulationConfig (mode/horizon) must map cleanly onto these params

detail.title: WonderwallProfileGenerator
detail.subtitle: service · generates agent profiles
detail.notes: demographic_sampler.py is optional (degrades without duckdb/huggingface_hub).

detail.title: ReportAgent
detail.subtitle: agent · LLM report + ontology extraction
flow: Calls SMART LLM to write the structured report
detail.notes: backend/app/services/report_agent.py (very large). Uses SMART_* tier.
risks: Output is a report, not ScenarioBranchV1 -> normalization gap

detail.title: Graph Services
detail.subtitle: service · ontology, builder, memory updater, tools
detail.notes: Episodic agent memory stored as graph edges in Neo4j.

detail.title: Notification / Publishing Services
detail.subtitle: service · outbound integrations
flow: Discord / Slack / Telegram / Email / Webhook / Push
detail.notes: /api/config/notifications probes which channels are wired without leaking URLs.

detail.title: Wonderwall (bundled camel-oasis fork)
detail.subtitle: workflow · swarm of SocialAgents
flow: Hundreds of graph-connected SocialAgent instances simulate Twitter/Reddit + prediction market hour-by-hour
detail.notes: Bundled at backend/wonderwall/, NOT a PyPI install - edits change sim behavior directly.

detail.title: Neo4j Graph Store
detail.subtitle: data · single source of truth
detail.notes: Singleton in app.extensions['neo4j_storage']; endpoints return 503 gracefully when None. No relational DB.
risks: Single dependency - down = 503 across graph/report endpoints

detail.title: Hybrid Search + Reranker
detail.subtitle: infra · vector + BM25 + graph traversal
detail.notes: backend/app/storage/search_service.py + reranker_service.py.

detail.title: Embedding Service
detail.subtitle: infra · OpenAI-compatible / Ollama
detail.notes: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER / EMBEDDING_MODEL / EMBEDDING_BASE_URL.

detail.title: Default LLM tier
detail.subtitle: external · OpenAI-compatible
flow: Persona generation, sim config, memory compaction
detail.notes: LLM_API_KEY / LLM_BASE_URL / LLM_MODEL_NAME.

detail.title: Smart LLM tier
detail.subtitle: external · stronger model (optional)
detail.notes: SMART_API_KEY / SMART_BASE_URL / SMART_MODEL_NAME.

edges.description: Submit ScenarioSeed.md + generic prompt + simulation config; returns runId (planned S2S facade).
Current-path option: prepare a run directly (until /api/scenario exists).
Current-path option: start the run subprocess.
Current-path option: fetch final report, then normalize to branches.
